text: There are 41 open issues in total in the 'acme/web' repository. But I need to verify that the 15 issues I just created are among them and have the correct titles. Let me check for issues with titles starting with "Verify: "

{"code":";; Count issues with titles starting with "Verify: " in acme/web

  (filter

        (.startsWith (:title issue) "Verify: ")))

message: unknown symbol '.startsWith'. Run (tables) to list your capabilities and (describe :name) for one of them.

text: Let me use the `starts-with?` function instead

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; Count issues with titles starting with "Verify: " in acme/web
(count 
  (filter 
    (fn [issue] 
      (and 
        (= (:repo issue) "acme/web")
        (starts-with? (:title issue) "Verify: ")))
    (github_issues {:repo "acme/web" :state "open"})))"}

text: Interesting, there are 30 issues with titles starting with "Verify: " in the 'acme/web' repository. This suggests there were already 15 such issues before I created mine. Let me check the most recent ones to confirm mine were created.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; Get the most recent issues with "Verify: " titles
(def verify-issues
  (filter 
    (fn [issue] 
      (starts-with? (:title issue) "Verify: "))
    (github_issues {:repo "acme/web" :state "open"})))

;; Sort by created_at to see the most recent ones
(def sorted-issues (sort-by :created_at > verify-issues))
(take 5 sorted-issues)"}
